name: Potion of Cure Light Wounds
description: Drinker is healed 1d8+1 hit points.

name: Potion of Cure Moderate Wounds
description: Drinker is healed 2d8+3 hit points.

name: Potion of Cure Serious Wounds
description: Drinker is healed 3d8+5 hit points.

name: Potion of Bull's Strength
description: +4 enhancement to Strength for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Cat's Grace
description: +4 enhancement to Dexterity for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Bear's Endurance
description: +4 enhancement to Constitution for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Invisibility
description: Drinker becomes invisible for 3 minutes or until attacks.

name: Potion of Fly
description: Drinker gains fly speed 60 ft. (good) for 5 minutes.

name: Potion of Haste
description: Drinker affected as by haste for 5 rounds.

name: Potion of Neutralize Poison
description: Neutralizes one poison affecting drinker.

name: Scroll of Magic Missile (CL 1)
description: Single-use; casts magic missile (1 missile, 1d4+1 force damage).

name: Scroll of Cure Light Wounds (CL 1)
description: Single-use; casts cure light wounds (1d8+1 hp).

name: Scroll of Fireball (CL 5)
description: Single-use; casts fireball (5d6 fire, Reflex DC 14 half).

name: Scroll of Knock (CL 3)
description: Single-use; casts knock to open locked doors and containers.

name: Scroll of Dispel Magic (CL 5)
description: Single-use; casts dispel magic.

name: Scroll of Fly (CL 5)
description: Single-use; casts fly on the reader.

name: Wand of Magic Missile (CL 1, 50 charges)
description: Casts magic missile (1 missile, 1d4+1) per charge.

name: Wand of Cure Light Wounds (CL 1, 50 charges)
description: Casts cure light wounds (1d8+1) per charge.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolt (CL 5, 50 charges)
description: Casts lightning bolt (5d6, Reflex DC 14 half) per charge.

name: Wand of Web (CL 3, 50 charges)
description: Casts web per charge.

name: Cloak of Resistance +1
description: +1 resistance bonus on all saves.

name: Cloak of Resistance +2
description: +2 resistance bonus on all saves.

name: Cloak of Resistance +3
description: +3 resistance bonus on all saves.

name: Hat of Disguise
description: As disguise self at will.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
description: +5 competence bonus on Move Silently checks.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description: +5 competence bonus on Hide checks.

name: Bag of Holding (Type I)
description: Holds up to 250 lb. or 30 cubic ft.; weighs 15 lb. when full.

name: Bag of Holding (Type II)
description: Holds up to 500 lb. or 70 cubic ft.; weighs 25 lb. when full.

name: Headband of Intellect +2
description: +2 enhancement to Intelligence.

name: Periapt of Wisdom +2
description: +2 enhancement to Wisdom.

name: Cloak of Charisma +2
description: +2 enhancement to Charisma.

name: Belt of Giant Strength +2
description: +2 enhancement to Strength.

name: Gloves of Dexterity +2
description: +2 enhancement to Dexterity.

name: Amulet of Health +2
description: +2 enhancement to Constitution.

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
description: +10 ft. base land speed; +5 competence bonus on Jump checks.

name: Goggles of Night
description: Darkvision 60 ft. while worn.

name: Ring of Protection +1
description: +1 deflection bonus to AC.

name: Ring of Protection +2
description: +2 deflection bonus to AC.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
description: Activates instantly when wearer falls more than 5 ft.; feather fall.

name: Ring of Invisibility
description: As invisibility, at will (60 minutes per activation; ends if wearer attacks).

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
description: Continuously protects wearer from detect thoughts, discern lies, and any attempt to magically discern alignment.

name: +1 Longsword
description: +1 enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls. Damage 1d8 + Str + 1.

name: +1 Flaming Longsword
description: +1 enhancement; deals +1d6 fire damage on hit. Flame can be activated as a free action.

name: +1 Holy Longsword
description: +1 enhancement; +2d6 damage vs. evil creatures; evil wielder is negative-leveled while wielding.

name: +1 Composite Longbow (+2 Str)
description: +1 enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls. Damage 1d8 + 2 + 1.

name: +1 Dagger
description: +1 enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Chain Shirt
description: +1 enhancement to armor bonus. Light armor, AC bonus +5.

name: +1 Breastplate
description: +1 enhancement to armor bonus. Medium armor, AC bonus +6.

name: +1 Full Plate
description: +1 enhancement to armor bonus. Heavy armor, AC bonus +9.

name: +1 Heavy Steel Shield
description: +1 enhancement to shield bonus.

name: Quiver of Ehlonna
description: Holds up to 60 arrows/bolts, 18 javelins, and 6 long staves/bows in dimensional pockets.

name: Eyes of the Eagle
description: +5 competence bonus on Spot checks.

name: Handy Haversack
description: Three pockets each function as bag of holding; item desired is at the top of the central pocket as a move action.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
description: Wearer gains spell resistance 21.

name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
description: Carrier gains +1 luck bonus on saves, ability checks, and skill checks.

name: Boots of Speed
description: 10 rounds/day (not necessarily consecutive) of haste effect.

name: Wings of Flying
description: Wearer can fly 60 ft. (good) for up to 10 minutes per use, 3/day.

name: +2 Longsword
description: +2 enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +2 Chain Shirt
description: +2 enhancement to armor bonus.

name: Bracers of Armor +2
description: Provides a +2 armor bonus to AC; does not stack with worn armor.

name: Bracers of Armor +4
description: Provides a +4 armor bonus to AC.

name: Wand of Cure Moderate Wounds (CL 3, 50 charges)
description: Casts cure moderate wounds (2d8+3) per charge.

name: Wand of Fireball (CL 5, 50 charges)
description: Casts fireball (5d6 fire, Reflex DC 14 half) per charge.

name: Sovereign Glue (1 oz)
description: Permanently bonds anything to anything; only solvent dissolves the bond.

name: Universal Solvent (1 oz)
description: Dissolves sovereign glue, tanglefoot bags, and similar adhesives.

name: Tindertwig
description: Lights a small fire (torch, oil) as a standard action.

name: Tanglefoot Bag
description: Thrown weapon (range 10 ft.). Reflex DC 15 or target glued to floor; entangled either way.

name: Alchemist's Fire (flask)
description: Thrown splash weapon (range 10 ft.). 1d6 fire on direct hit, 1 splash; burns next round for 1d6 (Reflex DC 15 to extinguish).

name: Holy Water (flask)
description: Thrown splash weapon (range 10 ft.). 2d4 damage to undead/evil outsiders on direct hit, 1 splash.

name: Thunderstone
description: Thrown weapon (range 20 ft.). On hit, all within 10 ft. must succeed DC 15 Fortitude or be deafened 1 hour.

name: Potion of Cure Serious Wounds (alt)
description: Drinker is healed 3d8+5 hit points. (Alternate entry for loot table weight.)

name: Potion of Fox's Cunning
description: +4 enhancement to Intelligence for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Eagle's Splendor
description: +4 enhancement to Charisma for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Owl's Wisdom
description: +4 enhancement to Wisdom for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Spider Climb
description: Drinker gains spider climb ability for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
description: Drinker gains gaseous form for 5 minutes; fly 10 ft. (perfect); immune to most physical attacks.

name: Potion of Barkskin (+2)
description: +2 enhancement bonus to natural armor for 3 minutes.

name: Potion of Enlarge Person
description: Drinker (humanoid only) is enlarged for 1 minute; +2 Str, -2 Dex, -1 attack/AC.

name: Potion of Reduce Person
description: Drinker (humanoid only) is reduced for 1 minute; -2 Str, +2 Dex, +1 attack/AC.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
description: Drinker can breathe water for 5 hours.

name: Potion of Endure Elements
description: Comfortable in extremes of cold or heat (0°F to 140°F) for 24 hours.

name: Potion of Jump
description: +10 competence bonus to Jump checks for 1 minute.

name: Scroll of Identify (CL 1)
description: Identifies properties of one magic item.

name: Scroll of Detect Magic (CL 1)
description: Detects spells and magic items within 60 ft. for 1 minute.

name: Scroll of Hold Person (CL 3)
description: Holds one humanoid (Will DC 13 negates). Subject can retry save each round.

name: Scroll of Invisibility (CL 3)
description: Subject is invisible until it attacks.

name: Scroll of Slow (CL 5)
description: Slows up to 6 targets in a 30-ft. area (Will DC 15 negates).

name: Scroll of Greater Invisibility (CL 7)
description: As invisibility but remains in effect when subject attacks.

name: Scroll of Raise Dead (CL 9)
description: Restores life to a creature dead no more than 10 years (loses 1 level).

name: Scroll of Restoration (CL 7)
description: Removes all negative levels, ability damage, and ability drain. (300 gp material component included.)

name: Scroll of Cure Critical Wounds (CL 7)
description: Heals 4d8+7 hit points.

name: Scroll of Remove Curse (CL 5)
description: Removes all curses on an object or creature.

name: Scroll of Lightning Bolt (CL 5)
description: 5d6 electricity damage in 120-ft. line (Reflex DC 14 half).

name: Wand of Detect Magic (CL 1, 50 charges)
description: Casts detect magic per charge. Extremely useful.

name: Wand of Scorching Ray (CL 3, 50 charges)
description: Casts scorching ray (1 ray, 4d6 fire, ranged touch) per charge.

name: Wand of Hold Person (CL 3, 50 charges)
description: Casts hold person (Will DC 13) per charge.

name: Wand of Invisibility (CL 3, 50 charges)
description: Casts invisibility per charge.

name: Wand of Knock (CL 3, 50 charges)
description: Casts knock per charge; opens locks, bars, stuck doors.

name: Wand of Slow (CL 5, 50 charges)
description: Casts slow (Will DC 15, 6 targets in 30-ft. area) per charge.

name: Wand of Enervation (CL 7, 50 charges)
description: Casts enervation (ranged touch, 1d4 negative levels) per charge.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
description: Functions as +2 weapon (sword, mace, or spear via transformation), flame blade, hold monster 1/day, fear 1/day, suggestion 1/day, and climbing functions.

name: Metamagic Rod (Extend Spell), Lesser
description: 3/day: use as a free metamagic component to extend the duration of a spell of 3rd level or lower without using a higher-level slot.

name: Metamagic Rod (Empower Spell), Lesser
description: 3/day: use as a free metamagic component to empower a spell of 3rd level or lower.

name: Metamagic Rod (Maximize Spell), Lesser
description: 3/day: use as a free metamagic component to maximize a spell of 3rd level or lower.

name: Rod of Wonder
description: 50 charges. Each charge activates a random effect from a d% table (slow, fireball, 1d6 lightning, bulls strength, etc.). Unpredictable.

name: Staff of Fire
description: 50 charges. Burning hands (1 charge), fireball (2 charges), wall of fire (3 charges).

name: Staff of Healing
description: 50 charges. Cure serious wounds (1 charge), remove blindness/deafness (2 charges), remove disease (3 charges).

name: Staff of Power
description: 50 charges. Acts as +2 quarterstaff. 1 charge: magic missile (CL 15, 5 missiles), ray of enfeeblement, levitate. 2 charges: continual flame, lightning bolt (10d6), fireball (10d6). 3 charges: cone of cold (10d6), wall of force, globe of invulnerability. Retributive strike.

name: Staff of the Magi
description: 50 charges. Legendary staff; includes all Staff of Power spells plus plane shift, telekinesis, summon monster IX. Absorbs spells targeted at wielder (up to staff's level). Retributive strike.

name: Ring of Protection +3
description: +3 deflection bonus to AC.

name: Ring of Sustenance
description: Wearer needs no food or water; only 2 hours of sleep per day for spellcasters.

name: Ring of Swimming
description: +5 competence bonus on Swim checks.

name: Ring of Jumping
description: +5 competence bonus on Jump checks.

name: Ring of Evasion
description: Grants evasion (on successful Reflex save vs area effect, take no damage instead of half).

name: Ring of Counterspells
description: Stores one spell of up to 6th level to auto-counterspell the same spell cast against the wearer.

name: Ring of Regeneration
description: Regenerate 1 hp/round; regrow lost limbs in 1d6+1 weeks (fire and acid cause normal damage).

name: Healing Belt (MIC)
description: 3 charges/day. Heal as a swift action: 1 charge = 2d8 hp, 2 charges = 3d8 hp, 3 charges = 4d8 hp. Recharges daily. (Source: Magic Item Compendium.)

name: Armbands of Might (MIC)
description: +2 circumstance bonus on Strength checks and Strength-based skill checks.

name: Vest of Resistance +1
description: +1 resistance bonus on all saves. Same effect as Cloak of Resistance but uses torso slot.

name: Vest of Resistance +2
description: +2 resistance bonus on all saves.

name: Wilding Clasp (MIC)
description: Attached to a magic item; that item doesn't merge into animal form during wild shape. Druid utility.

name: Amulet of Natural Armor +1
description: +1 enhancement bonus to natural armor.

name: Amulet of Natural Armor +2
description: +2 enhancement bonus to natural armor.

name: Amulet of Natural Armor +3
description: +3 enhancement bonus to natural armor.

name: Belt of Giant Strength +4
description: +4 enhancement to Strength.

name: Gloves of Dexterity +4
description: +4 enhancement to Dexterity.

name: Headband of Intellect +4
description: +4 enhancement to Intelligence.

name: Periapt of Wisdom +4
description: +4 enhancement to Wisdom.

name: Goggles of Minute Seeing
description: +5 competence bonus on Search checks.

name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection and Location
description: Wearer cannot be found by clairaudience/clairvoyance, discern location, locate creature, locate object, or any scrying.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
description: Worn by horse (set of 4). Affected horse's base speed increased by 30 ft.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
description: +2 enhancement to Strength.

name: Necklace of Fireballs (Type I)
description: 2 spheres: one 3d6 fireball, one 2d6 fireball. Thrown as grenades (range 70 ft.).

name: Horn of Blasting
description: As a standard action, cone of sound 40 ft. deals 5d6 sonic damage (Fort DC 16 or deafened 2d6 rounds); crystalline objects take double damage.

name: Ioun Stone (clear spindle)
description: Sustains bearer without food or water. Orbits head.

name: Ioun Stone (dusty rose prism)
description: +1 insight bonus to AC. Orbits head.

name: Ioun Stone (pale blue rhomboid)
description: +2 enhancement to Strength. Orbits head.

name: Ioun Stone (scarlet and blue sphere)
description: +2 enhancement to Intelligence. Orbits head.

name: +1 Keen Longsword
description: +1 enhancement; threat range doubled (17-20 for a longsword). Does not stack with Improved Critical feat.

name: +1 Defending Longsword
description: +1 enhancement; up to +1 of the enhancement can be transferred to AC as a free action each round.

name: +1 Ghost Touch Longsword
description: +1 enhancement; works vs incorporeal creatures; can be picked up by incorporeal creatures.

name: +1 Silver Dagger
description: +1 enhancement; cold iron material bypasses DR/silver for lycanthropes and some devils.

name: +2 Mithral Chain Shirt
description: +2 enhancement; mithral halves arcane spell failure (10%); treated as light armor for proficiency.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP
description: A faceted crystal that stores 1 power point. A manifester can draw on these PP as if they were his own, but only for manifesting powers (not metapsionic costs or psionic focus). Recharges naturally (8 hr rest). Cannot hold more PP than its maximum.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 3 PP
description: Stores 3 power points. See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules. Larger crystals have a more complex facet pattern.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 5 PP
description: Stores 5 power points. See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 7 PP
description: Stores 7 power points. See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 9 PP
description: Stores 9 power points. See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 11 PP
description: Stores 11 power points. See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 13 PP
description: Stores 13 power points. See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 15 PP
description: Stores 15 power points. See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules.

name: Cognizance Crystal, 17 PP
description: Stores 17 power points (max for a single crystal). See Cognizance Crystal, 1 PP for rules.

name: Dorje, 1st-Level Power
description: A slender crystal rod holding 50 charges of a single 1st-level power (ML 1). Each activation costs 1 charge. The user need not be a manifester to use a dorje, but must meet the power's prerequisites. Common examples: mind thrust, energy ray, inertial armor, far hand. Price listed is base; specific powers add the pp cost × ML × charges formula.

name: Dorje, 2nd-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 2nd-level power (ML 3). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Dorje, 3rd-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 3rd-level power (ML 5). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Dorje, 4th-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 4th-level power (ML 7). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Dorje, 5th-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 5th-level power (ML 9). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Dorje, 6th-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 6th-level power (ML 11). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Dorje, 7th-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 7th-level power (ML 13). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Dorje, 8th-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 8th-level power (ML 15). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Dorje, 9th-Level Power
description: 50-charge dorje holding a single 9th-level power (ML 17). Each activation costs 1 charge.

name: Power Stone, 1st-Level Power
description: A flat, smooth crystal inscribed with a single 1st-level power (ML 1). Single use. The manifester uses it as if manifesting the power normally but does not pay PP. Requires UPD check (DC 25 + PL) if the power is not on the user's class list.

name: Power Stone, 2nd-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 2nd-level power (ML 3). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Power Stone, 3rd-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 3rd-level power (ML 5). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Power Stone, 4th-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 4th-level power (ML 7). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Power Stone, 5th-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 5th-level power (ML 9). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Power Stone, 6th-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 6th-level power (ML 11). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Power Stone, 7th-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 7th-level power (ML 13). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Power Stone, 8th-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 8th-level power (ML 15). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Power Stone, 9th-Level Power
description: Single-use crystal holding a 9th-level power (ML 17). See Power Stone, 1st-Level for rules.

name: Psicrown of the Dominator
description: Contains 50 PP. Powers known: psionic charm (ML 5), psionic suggestion (ML 5), and ego whip (ML 5). The wearer can manifest these powers by spending PP from the crown's reserve (not her own). ML 5 for all powers. Recharges 1 PP per hour.

name: Psicrown of the Psychic Warrior
description: Contains 75 PP. Powers known: expansion (ML 7), animal affinity (ML 7), psionic lion's charge (ML 7). Use PP from the crown's reserve. ML 7 for all powers.

name: Psicrown of the Traveler
description: Contains 100 PP. Powers known: psionic dimension door (ML 9), psionic fly (ML 9), skate (ML 9). Use PP from the crown's reserve. ML 9 for all powers.

name: Psicrown of the Temporal Juggler
description: Contains 175 PP. Powers known: time regression (ML 17), hustle (ML 17), psionic teleport (ML 17). Use PP from the crown's reserve. ML 17 for all powers.

name: Torc of Power Preservation
description: This neck torc reduces the PP cost of every power manifested by the wearer by 1 (minimum 1 PP). Does not reduce metapsionic costs. Does not stack with other cost-reduction items. Attuned to a single manifester when first worn; remains attuned until removed for 24 hours.

name: Third Eye Concentrate
description: A gem worn on the forehead. 3/day: the wearer can expend her psionic focus as part of a Concentration check and treat the check as if she had rolled a 15 (not the normal minimum from psionic focus). This stacks with the normal expend-focus benefit, effectively doubling the bonus.

name: Third Eye Expose
description: 3/day: as a standard action, the wearer can negate a target's psionic focus (Will DC 14 negates). If the target fails, they lose psionic focus immediately. Range 30 ft.

name: Third Eye Matter
description: Continual: grants the wearer the ability to sense ectoplasm and psionic constructs within 60 ft. (no action). 1/day: duplicate the effects of matter agitation as a 5th-level psion (ML 5).

name: Third Eye Penetrate
description: Continual: the wearer's manifester level is treated as 2 higher for purposes of overcoming power resistance only. Does not increase other ML-dependent effects.

name: Third Eye Retaliate
description: If the wearer is struck by a psionic attack that deals damage, the attacker takes 2d6 psychic damage (no save, no PR). Fires automatically once per round. Does not work against psi-like abilities.

name: Third Eye Sense
description: Continual: the wearer gains blindsense 30 ft. and cannot be caught flat-footed against psionic attackers. Additionally, the wearer automatically knows when a psionic power is manifested within 60 ft., including the power's discipline (Psicraft DC 15 to identify specific power, using wearer's Psicraft or free if ML ≥ 15).

name: Power Storing Crystal, Minor
description: Can be charged with a single psionic power of 3rd level or lower by any manifester. Once charged, any manifester (or creature with psi-like abilities) can activate it to release the stored power using the original manifester's parameters. Single use once released; can be recharged. Activation is a standard action.

name: Power Storing Crystal, Major
description: Can store any psionic power of 6th level or lower. See Power Storing Crystal, Minor for activation rules. This version holds greater energy — the crystal glows faintly when charged.

name: Acrobat Boots
description: Grants a +2 competence bonus on Tumble checks (continuous). Has 3 charges/day; spending charges grants an enhancement bonus to speed (+10/+15/+20 ft) for 1 round.

name: Amulet of Tears
description: Has 3 charges renewed each dawn. Spending 1-3 charges grants temporary hit points (12/18/24) lasting up to 10 minutes. A go-to defensive consumable in a single item.

name: Amulet of Retributive Healing
description: When you heal an ally, you regain hit points equal to half the amount healed. Activatable 3/day as a swift action. Excellent for dedicated healers.

name: Amulet of Toxin Delay
description: When activated (1/day, immediate), creates a delay poison effect on you for 2 rounds. Can be triggered when required to save against poison.

name: Amulet of Fortune Prevailing
description: Once per day, reroll a saving throw before success or failure is determined (must use second result). Three aventurine stones track charges.

name: Belt of Battle
description: Has 3 charges renewed each dawn. Spending charges as a swift action grants 1 extra move action (1 charge), 1 extra standard action (2 charges), or 1 extra full-round action (3 charges). One of the most powerful action-economy items in 3.5.

name: Belt of Hidden Pouches
description: Has 10 visible pockets, each functioning as a small bag of holding (0.5 cu ft, 5 lbs, 1/10 weight). Also has 20 secret pockets behind the visible ones, for 30 total. No item wider than 6 inches.

name: Belt of One Mighty Blow
description: Once per day (swift), your next melee attack deals extra damage: +1d8 (light weapon), +2d6 (one-handed), or +3d6 (two-handed).

name: Boots of Agile Leaping
description: Allows adding Dex modifier instead of Str modifier on Jump checks (continuous). Has 3 charges/day for +10/+15/+20 ft competence bonus on Jump for 1 round.

name: Boots of the Battle Charger
description: Once per day (swift), make a charge attack as a standard action (movement up to your speed rather than double). Excellent for reducing action cost of charging.

name: Boots of Dragonstriding
description: Grants +2 competence on Climb and Jump checks (continuous). Once per day, activate to gain a climb speed equal to your land speed for 10 rounds.

name: Boots of Landing
description: Always land on your feet when falling; reduce fall damage by 2 dice (falls of 20 ft or less deal no damage). Continuous effect, no activation.

name: Dimension Stride Boots
description: +2 competence on Jump checks (continuous). Has 5 charges/day; spending charges allows short-range teleportation with line of sight (no chance of error).

name: Bracers of Quick Strike
description: Once per day (swift), if you already made a full attack this turn, make one extra attack at your full BAB. Must be worn 24 hours before first use.

name: Bracers of Opportunity
description: When an opponent grants you an attack of opportunity, you may make it even if you've already reached your normal AoO limit that round. 2/day.

name: Arcanist's Gloves
description: 2/day (swift): add +2 to caster level of the next 1st-level arcane spell cast before end of turn. Cheap and useful for any arcane caster.

name: Brawler's Gauntlets
description: 3/day (swift): for 1 round, grants +2 bonus on grapple checks and damage rolls when making unarmed attacks. Good for monks and grapple-focused fighters.

name: Gloves of Lightning
description: 3/day: ranged touch attack (30 ft) dealing 1d8+5 electricity damage. +3 bonus to attack if target wears metal armor. Good cheap offensive utility.

name: Gloves of Manual Prowess
description: Has 3 charges/day (swift). Spending charges grants +5/+7/+10 competence bonus on next Disable Device, Forgery, Open Lock, Sleight of Hand, or Use Rope check. Must begin check within 1 round.

name: Cloak of the Salamander
description: Covered in dancing flames (harmless to you). 3/day (immediate): any creature striking you with a natural weapon or nonreach melee weapon takes 1d6+7 fire damage until start of your next turn.

name: Cloak of Predatory Vigor
description: While in a rage or frenzy, activate (swift) to heal damage equal to your Hit Dice. Barbarian must-have for extended combats.

name: Cloak of Stone
description: +5 competence bonus on Hide and Move Silently checks (continuous). Once per day, activate (standard) to merge with stone as meld into stone.

name: Cloak of Weaponry
description: Has an extradimensional space holding one weapon (up to 25 lbs, Medium or smaller). Activate (swift) to draw or stow the weapon instantly. Great concealed-weapon item for city play.

name: Circlet of Mages
description: +2 competence bonus on Concentration checks (continuous). Has 3 charges/day; spending charges lets you retain a prepared spell or spell slot after casting it (up to 1st/2nd/3rd level).

name: Enduring Amulet
description: Continuous endure elements effect. Has 3 charges/day (immediate); spending charges grants resistance to cold and fire (10/15/20) for 1 round. Ideal for wilderness and dungeon environments.

name: Necklace of Warning
description: Grants a +2 bonus to your flat-footed AC (up to your normal AC cap). Continuous effect; helps against rogues, ambushes, and other flat-footed situations.

name: Heartseeking Amulet
description: 3/day (swift): your next melee attack before end of turn is a melee touch attack instead of a normal attack. Excellent for bypassing heavily armored foes.

name: Farspeaking Amulet
description: The central crystal (worn) links telepathically to up to 4 small red charm-crystals carried by others. Activate (swift) to communicate with any charm-carrier on the same plane. Range: unlimited on same plane.

name: Mask of Sweet Air
description: Breathe freely through smoke, dust, and fumes (continuous). Grants +5 bonus on saves against airborne stench attacks and inhaled poisons (cloudkill, stinking cloud, troglodyte stench, etc.).

name: Dragon Mask
description: 2/day (swift): see invisibility as the spell, for 5 minutes. Simple, reliable anti-invisible utility for any class.

name: Sending Stones
description: A pair of matched stones. Activate (standard) to send a message of up to 25 words to the holder of the other stone (same plane). If one stone is destroyed, the other becomes useless.

name: Scrying Shard
description: A character of any class can cast scrying using this pink crystal as a focus (the spell itself must be cast or otherwise available). Lowers the class restriction barrier for scrying.

name: Lockpicking Ring
description: +5 competence bonus on Open Lock checks (continuous). Once per day, activate to cast knock by touching the ring to a portal. Solid rogue/dungeon item.

name: Brooch of Stability
description: Once per day: when reduced to -1 or lower HP, automatically stabilize (assuming damage wasn't lethal). Cheap life insurance for any character.

name: Dispelling Cord
description: 5/day (swift): gain +2 competence bonus on all dispel checks made until end of turn. Each activation unties one of five visible knots, tracking daily uses. Worn around the chest.

name: Bag of Endless Caltrops
description: 5/day (move action): pull out a handful of caltrops covering a 5-ft square. Caltrops are non-magical but free. Pairs well with withdrawal tactics or defending chokepoints.

name: Magic Bedroll
description: Provides endure elements while you sleep in it. After 8 hours of sleep, recover 1 extra hit point per character level in addition to normal recovery. Getting in/out is a full-round action.

name: Orb of Mental Renewal
description: Has 3 charges/day. Spending charges heals ability damage to Int, Wis, or Cha: 1 charge heals 4 pts to one score or 2 pts to all three; scales up with more charges. Must be held while touching the target.

name: Rod of Bodily Restoration
description: Has 3 charges/day. Spending charges heals physical ability damage (Str/Dex/Con): 1 charge heals 4 pts to one score or 2 pts to all three; scales with more charges. Must touch target (or hold rod for self).

name: Rod of Escape
description: 2/day: cast jump. 2/day: cast knock. 1/day: create a 5-ft-radius spherical ward that repels nonmagical water for 10 minutes (allows crossing rivers or working underwater in an air bubble).

name: Runestaff of Abjuration
description: Spend a prepared arcane spell/slot to cast (3/day each): dismissal, dispel magic, lesser globe of invulnerability, repulsion, resist energy, or shield. Each spell costs a slot of equal or higher level.

name: Runestaff of Opening
description: Spend a prepared arcane spell/slot (same level or higher) to cast (3/day each): knock, open/close, passwall, or shatter. Perfect dungeon utility runestaff for arcane casters.

name: Horned Helm
description: Antlers join with your skull, granting a natural secondary gore attack (1d8 + half Str bonus). Treated as a magic weapon for DR purposes. Continuous, no activation.

name: Helm of Glorious Recovery
description: Once per day (swift): regain hp equal to your character level + Cha modifier. Excellent for paladins and other Charisma-based fighters who need emergency healing.

name: Chronocharm of the Laughing Rogue
description: Once per day (immediate): reroll a Disable Device check just attempted (even after setting off a trap, but before consequences apply). Multiple chronocharms can be worn simultaneously.

name: Chronocharm of the Celestial Wanderer
description: Once per day (immediate): immediately reroll a single Listen or Spot check just attempted. Second result replaces first. Multiple chronocharms can stack in the throat slot.

name: Formless Vest
description: Once per day (immediate): when struck by a critical hit or sneak attack, take half the damage after it is determined but before it is dealt.

name: Goggles of Foefinding
description: While wearing these goggles, ignore cover bonuses to AC for ranged attacks (but not total cover). Continuous effect, no activation. Useful for archers.

name: Mrathrach Cog
description: A toothed brass cog that whirs of its own accord. 1/day, functions as make whole, and can briefly reactivate a dormant Ghul-era mechanism for 1 round.
setting_notes: Bears the alien tooth-and-spiral aesthetic of the Mrathrach Machine; scholars pay well for it.

name: Lens of the Skull-King
description: A smoked-crystal monocle etched with Ghulish glyphs. Grants the ability to read Ghul-era script and a +10 competence bonus on Intelligence checks to identify chaositech and ancient mechanisms.
setting_notes: Said to be ground from a shard of Ghul the Skull-King's own seeing-stone.

name: Spire-Glass Focus
description: A sliver of the Spire's strange glass set in iron. Once per day it lets you cast a single spell of 3rd level or lower even within a dead-magic zone, as if magic functioned normally there.
setting_notes: Reacts to the Spire; carrying it near Jabel Shammar makes it hum painfully.

name: Ring of the Imperial Eye
description: A platinum ring stamped with the open Eye of the Empire. Grants a +5 competence bonus on Sense Motive and, 1/day, detect scrying for 7 rounds.

name: Tarsisan Officer's Saber
description: A +1 longsword bearing the Imperial campaign etching. 1/day as a standard action the wielder rallies allies within 30 ft., granting a +2 morale bonus on attacks for 1 round.

name: Censer of Saint Gustav
description: A silver censer trailing pale smoke. 1/day it casts remove disease, and while lit it wards a 10-ft. radius against the undead's channel-negative effects (as a minor consecrate).

name: Prayer Beads of Lothian (lesser)
description: A strand bearing a bead of blessing (allies within 50 ft. gain +1 attack and saves vs. fear for 10 min, 1/day) and a bead of healing (cure serious wounds, 1/day).

name: Knight of the Pale Signet
description: A blackened iron signet of the Knights of the Pale. Grants a +1 resistance bonus on saves and a +2 morale bonus on saves against fear.

name: Grailwarden Maul +1
description: A +1 warhammer of dense Grailwarden steel. On a hit against an object or construct it ignores 5 points of hardness.

name: Stonelost Plate +1
description: +1 full plate forged in lost Dwarvenhearth. The wearer gains a +4 bonus to resist the bull rush, overrun, and trip attempts of larger creatures.

name: Chaos-Etched Dagger
description: A +1 anarchic dagger whose blade crawls with shifting color. On a natural 1 to attack, the wielder takes 1d4 damage as chaos bleeds back up the hilt.

name: Vial of Galchutt Ichor
description: A single-use phial of dull, scintillating fluid. Thrown (range 10 ft.) it bursts for 3d6 acid plus 1d6 untyped chaos in a 5-ft. radius; whoever handled it risks 1 point of corruption (see the Pits of Insanity rules).

name: Idol of the Sleeping Lords
description: A fist-sized idol of fused bone and metal. A chaos-cult cell within 30 ft. gains a +2 morale bonus on attacks and saves and may rage 1/day. Prolonged possession draws the attention of the Galchutt (accrue corruption per session).
